ls.notFound: Directory not accessible - check path and try again
ls.notADirectory: Path is not a directory - verify target
ls.invalid: Invalid path format - use absolute paths
ls.noSuchFile: Directory not found - verify path exists

create.alreadyExists: File already exists - use Edit tool to modify
create.permissionDenied: Cannot create file - check directory permissions
create.noSuchFileOrDirectory: Invalid path - check parent directory exists
create.isADirectory: Target is a directory - specify a file path
create.readOnly: File system is read-only - check permissions

edit.textNotFound: Text pattern not found - verify exact match
edit.notFound: File not found - check path or create it first
edit.noMatchFound: Text pattern not found - verify exact match
edit.multipleMatches: Multiple matches found - make pattern more specific
edit.isADirectory: Target is a directory - edit files only

applyPatch.fileNotFound: Target file not found - verify path
applyPatch.patchFailed: Patch doesn't match - file may have changed
applyPatch.hunkFailed: Patch partially failed - content has changed

generic.permissionDenied: Access restricted - check permissions and try again
generic.notFound: Target not found - verify path and try again
generic.alreadyExists: Target already exists - choose a different name
generic.invalid: Operation failed - check parameters and try again

rewindFailed: Error: Failed to prepare rewind session.
skillSessionFailed: Error: Failed to create skill session
noSessionsFound: Error: No sessions found in current directory. Use --resume <sessionId> to resume a specific session.

agent.initFailed: Error: Failed to initialize LLM client
agent.overloaded: The upstream AI model provider is currently overloaded. Please retry in a moment or switch models.
agent.contentModeration: Request blocked by provider safety checks. Please modify your request and avoid high-risk cyber activity instructions.
agent.networkError:
Error: {{message}}

This might be a network issue. Please check:
1. Your internet connection
2. Any firewall or proxy settings
agent.networkInfrastructureError: Unable to reach {{host}}. Check your network connection and try again.
agent.networkConnectionError: Unable to reach {{host}}. Your internet connection may be offline or interrupted. Check your network connection and try again.
agent.networkFirewallError: Unable to reach {{host}}. Your network appears to be blocking the connection. Check with your IT team if you're on a corporate network.
agent.networkTlsCertificateError: Unable to establish a secure connection to {{host}}. This may be caused by SSL inspection or a certificate configuration issue.
agent.byokError400:
BYOK Error: {{message}}{{detailSuffix}}

Troubleshooting tips for custom models:
1. Verify the "provider" type in your BYOK config matches your endpoint (use "openai" for GPT-4o/GPT-5+/o-series/Codex, "anthropic" for Claude, "generic-chat-completion-api" for other OpenAI-compatible APIs)
2. Ensure your baseUrl is reachable and the API key is valid
3. Check that the model name matches what your endpoint expects
agent.byokError402:
BYOK Error: {{errorMessage}}{{detailSuffix}}

 Please check your billing status with your BYOK model provider.
agent.byokErrorGeneric:
BYOK Error: {{message}}{{detailSuffix}}

If this persists, verify your custom model configuration in settings.
agent.apiValidationErrorSpecific:
API Validation Error: {{detail}}

This usually means there's an issue with the conversation history structure. This can happen when tool results don't match their corresponding tool calls. Please report this error with /bug.
agent.apiValidationErrorGeneric:
API Validation Error: {{message}}

There was a problem with the request format.  Please report this error with /bug.
agent.compactFailed:
Error: Failed to compact and start a new session.

{{detail}}
agent.warningSessionDir: Warning: Could not change to session directory: {{dir}}
agent.warningPromptIgnored: Warning: Initial prompt ignored when resuming session.
agent.byokOpenAIMismatch: Your custom model "{{model}}" appears to be an OpenAI model, but is configured with provider "{{provider}}". For GPT-5+, GPT-4o, o-series, and Codex models, use "provider": "openai" (Responses API). See https://docs.example.com/cli/byok/overview for details.
agent.byokAnthropicMismatch: Your custom model "{{model}}" appears to be a Claude/Anthropic model, but is configured with provider "{{provider}}". For Claude models (Haiku, Sonnet, Opus), use "provider": "anthropic". See https://docs.example.com/cli/byok/overview for details.
